explanation: This command simulates launching a LNK file via explorer.exe, which could be interpreted as accessing a WebDAV resource. It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection criteria by having explorer.exe as the parent process and potentially triggering execution via a LNK file.
This command uses cmd.exe to start a LNK file from a WebDAV path. It matches the Sigma rule by having cmd.exe as the child process of explorer.exe and referencing a WebDAV path.
This command uses PowerShell to start a LNK file from a WebDAV path. It aligns with the Sigma rule by using PowerShell as the child process of explorer.exe and referencing a WebDAV path.
This command uses mshta.exe to execute a LNK file from a WebDAV path. It matches the Sigma rule by using mshta.exe as the child process of explorer.exe and referencing a WebDAV path.
